summary: Backend API testing for Paul Fitness Gym MVP. Ran 17 pytest cases covering all requested flows: plans seed, gym-info, manager auth (login success/failure, /auth/me, logout invalidation), manager-only routes (stats, members list, search filter, status filter, 401 without token), cash payment recording with full end-to-end verification (record-cash -> member detail -> listing days_remaining -> stats active count increment), Razorpay disabled path returning 400, idempotency check (plan count stable, manager re-login). All 17/17 PASSED. No _id leakage observed in any verified response (plans, user, membership, history, listing). Test user was seeded directly into MongoDB users collection (cleanup performed in fixture teardown). No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/payments/order: only requires get_user_by_token (not require user role). Manager could trigger this. Not exploited here since Razorpay is disabled, but consider role check (role=='user') once Razorpay is enabled.
server.py uses @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan handler going forward (non-blocking).
Membership extension uses 30-day months (timedelta(days=30*duration_months)). Acceptable for fitness club but documenting it as a product decision is recommended.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_-prefixed user inserted directly into MongoDB users collection per module (fixture), cleaned up on teardown (memberships + user removed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (no EXPO_BACKEND_URL set). Manager creds: manager@paulfitness.com / Paul@Manager123. Google OAuth (/api/auth/google/session) is not headlessly testable — seed test users directly into Mongo users collection with role='user'. Plans seeded: plan_1m/plan_3m/plan_6m/plan_12m. Razorpay keys empty in .env → /api/payments/order returns 400 'not configured'. Pytest entry point: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py -v.
